title: エキサイティングお嬢様

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I are on our way back to the
academy after finishing some errands, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I have a favor I would like to ask of you today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well... Before, we talked about how I enjoy films,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want you to come out with me today as well, but
for something different. Wh-what I meant to say
is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I can't bring myself to say it! Would you just
accompany me for now?
choice_data_list: Of course, I'd be happy to.
Of course, I'd be happy to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a smile and a nod, I agree to go along with
her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Here we are. The truth is... this is a place I adore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No. Although I certainly wish it were as endearing
an interest as that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's the place next to the amusement park that I
like, not the park itself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Can you hear it? The sound of cheering?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A round of cheers resonates from the nearby
domed stadium. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I love to watch baseball. Particularly, I love
watching games at the stadium.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When I watch from behind home plate, I become
so shamefully invigorated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I begin screaming, "Go, Yutaka!" and the
like. Before I know it, my tail begins swishing out
of control.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm fully aware this kind of behavior is
unbecoming of a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Still, when I see my favorite team, the Victories,
in an intense game, I... Ahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm... not. I suddenly feel overwhelmed with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't contain myself any longer. Please, Trainer!
Come watch the game with me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I knew you would say that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well, then. Let's head into the stadium.
Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen immediately takes my hand and
breaks into a run. She seems really happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was truly exciting! Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you were surprised just now. My behavior
during the game was so unlike me.
choice_data_list: You sure like spinning your towel in the air!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The thrill just somehow takes control. I get all this
strength and I can shout right from my diaphragm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Next time... I'd like you to cheer along with me.
It's embarrassing to do it by myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I love doing that! I feel like a little kid,
twirling it round and round.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'd like you to do it too. I'll teach you
how, of course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At any rate... this was nice. I never thought
someone would agree to watch a baseball game
with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Being able to share the joy of victory with
someone as we walk home together is something
I've only ever dreamed of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I took a chance and invited you.
choice_data_list: Hey, we're batterymates, you and I.
Hey, we're batterymates, you and I.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Batterymates? You're saying we're pitcher and
catcher?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Indeed, you're right. We're in sync with
each other in this figurative game of catch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But since you've said it, I don't want you to
forget. If we're batterymates, that means we're
playing for the same team.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want you to accept any secret I choose to share.
Even my most shameful ones.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, Mejiro McQueen averts her eyes
just a little. There must be some things she isn't
yet able to share.
